2026-03-27T04:20:59.2173440Z 
2026-03-27T04:20:59.2174395Z 1. ÞÇ **API Design** (`arm-search-node.api.md:75`) ã `AzureClouds` enum is missing the required `Known*` prefix; should be `KnownAzureClouds`.
2026-03-27T04:20:59.2175253Z 
2026-03-27T04:20:59.2176376Z 2. ÞÇ **API Design** (`arm-search-node.api.md:82`) ã `AzureSupportedClouds` is a closed template literal type `` `${AzureClouds}` `` instead of the extensible `string` type required for open enums.
2026-03-27T04:20:59.2177080Z 
2026-03-27T04:20:59.2210339Z 3. ÞÀ **Tool Issue** (`package.json:9`) ã `autoPublish` was changed from `true` ã `false`, which would prevent automatic release pipeline inclusion. Needs confirmation this is intentional.

2026-03-27T04:21:14.8532642Z Agent: The repo memory file size is well within limits (596 bytes total), but the push_repo_memory validation is returning an error referencing 30 KB ã this appears to be a pre-existing state issue on the memory branch. Per Azure SDK guidelines, extensible en...`
